ield":false,"isSensitive":false,"isObject":false,"isArrayElement":false,"isScript":false},{"from":"['numbers.#object']","to":null,"map":null,"arrayPath":null,"arrayMapping":false,"lineItemGroup":null,"mappingFieldType":"BODY","fixed":true,"isCustom":false,"persistCustomField":false,"isSensitive":false,"isObject":true,"isArrayElement":false,"isScript":false},{"from":"numbers[0]","to":null,"map":null,"arrayPath":null,"arrayMapping":false,"lineItemGroup":null,"mappingFieldType":"BODY","fixed":true,"isCustom":false,"persistCustomField":false,"isSensitive":false,"isObject":false,"isArrayElement":false,"isScript":false},{"from":"#object","to":null,"map":null,"arrayPath":null,"arrayMapping":false,"lineItemGroup":null,"mappingFieldType":"BODY","fixed":true,"isCustom":false,"persistCustomField":false,"isSensitive":false,"isObject":true,"isArrayElement":false,"isScript":false}]},"responseContentType":"application/json","headers":null,"formArrayIndicator":null}],"enabled":null,"configurationId":null,"googlePayGateway":null,"createdAt":"2026-06-10T05:42:54.946Z","updatedAt":"2026-06-10T05:42:54.946Z","dynamicScript":{"html":"

","jsContent":"/* ============================================================ CONFIG ============================================================ */ var PAYU_CONFIG = { posId: OpfContext.vars.posId, currency: "RON", lang: "ro", sandbox: true, tokenType: "MULTI", }; var PAYU_IFRAME_STYLE = { basic: { fontColor: "#1a1a2e", fontSize: "15", fontFamily: "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif" }, focus: { fontColor: "#1a1a2e" }, placeholder: { fontColor: "#b0b7c9" }, }; /* ============================================================ SAVED CARDS DATA ============================================================ */ var SAVED_CARDS = (OpfContext.savedPaymentMethods || []).map(function (m) { return { id: m.pspPaymentMethodId, brand: (m.cardType || "CARD").toLowerCase(), last4: m.cardLast4 || null, expiry: m.cardExpiryDate || "N/A", token: m.pspPaymentMethodId, }; }); /* ============================================================ STATE ============================================================ */ var state = { mode: "saved", selectedCard: null, ready: { number: false, date: false, cvv: false }, valid: { number: false, date: false, cvv: false }, touched: { number: false, date: false, cvv: false }, installment: null, }; /* ============================================================ CACHED DOM REFS ============================================================ */ var el = { submitBtn: document.getElementById("payu-sf-submit-btn"), statusEl: document.getElementById("payu-sf-status"), newCardFields: document.getElementById("payu-sf-new-card-fields"), installPanel: document.getElementById("payu-sf-installments-panel"), instProvider: document.getElementById("payu-sf-inst-provider"), instGrid: document.getElementById("payu-sf-inst-grid"), instMinNote: document.getElementById("payu-sf-inst-min-note"), savedList: document.getElementById("payu-sf-saved-list"), }; /* ============================================================ HELPERS ============================================================ */ function setStatus(msg, type) { el.statusEl.textContent = msg || ""; el.statusEl.className = "payu-sf-status" + (type ? " payu-sf--" + type : ""); } function setLoading(loading) { el.submitBtn.disabled = loading; el.submitBtn.classList.toggle("payu-sf--loading", loading); } function updateSubmitState() { if (state.mode === "saved") { el.submitBtn.disabled = (state.selectedCard === null); } else { var allReady = state.ready.number && state.ready.date && state.ready.cvv; var allValid = state.valid.number && state.valid.date && state.valid.cvv; el.submitBtn.disabled = !(allReady && allValid); } } var ERROR_MESSAGES = { "error.validation.number": "Invalid card number.", "error.validation.expDate": "Invalid expiry date.", "error.validation.cvv": "Invalid CVV.", "error.validation.card.number": "Card number is required.", "error.validation.card.date": "Expiry date is required.", "error.validation.card.cvv": "CVV is required.", }; function friendlyError(errors) { if (!errors || !Array.isArray(errors) || !errors.length) return ""; return errors.map(function (e) { return ERROR_MESSAGES[e.code] || e.message || e.code; }).join(" "); } /* ============================================================ OPF PAYMENT SUBMISSION ============================================================ */ function makePayment(token, payuInstance) { var additionalData = [ { key: "token", value: token }, { key: "hasCardInstallment", value: !!state.installment }, {key: "requestType", value: "AUTH"}, ]; if (state.installment) { additionalData.push({ key: "installmentProvider", value: state.installment.provider }); additionalData.push({ key: "installmentNumber", value: state.installment.number }); } window.Opf.payments.checkout.submit({ additionalData: additionalData, submitSuccess: function (response) { setLoading(false); console.log("submitSuccess", response); }, submitPending: function (response) { setLoading(false); if (response && response.customFields && response.customFields.length > 0) { var map = new Map(response.customFields.map(function (obj) { return [obj.key, obj.value]; })); var redirectURI = map.get("redirectURI"); var statusCode = map.get("statusCode"); if (statusCode === "WARNING_CONTINUE_CVV") { var refReqId = payuInstance.extractRefReqId(redirectURI); payuInstance.sendCvv(refReqId); } if (redirectURI) { Opf.payments.checkout.handle3DSRedirect(redirectURI); } } }, submitFailure: function (response) { setLoading(false); console.log("submitFailure", response); }, submitCancel: function () { window.location.href = "/checkout/opf-payment-and-review"; }, }); } /* ============================================================ INSTALLMENTS PANEL ============================================================ */ function renderInstallments(data) { var hasRealInstallments = data && data.numbers && data.numbers.some(function (n) { return n > 1; }); if (!hasRealInstallments) { el.installPanel.hidden = true; state.installment = null; return; } el.instProvider.textContent = "Provider: " + (data.provider || "—"); el.instMinNote.textContent = (data.settings && data.settings.minAmount) ? "Minimum order amount for installments: " + PAYU_CONFIG.currency + " " + (data.settings.minAmount / 100).toFixed(2) : ""; el.instGrid.innerHTML = ""; data.numbers.forEach(function (n) { var btn = document.createElement("button"); btn.type = "button"; btn.className = "payu-sf-inst-btn"; btn.textContent = n === 1 ? "Full payment" : n + "× installments"; if (n === 1) { btn.classList.add("payu-sf--selected"); state.installment = null; } btn.addEventListener("click", function () { el.instGrid.querySelectorAll(".payu-sf-inst-btn").forEach(function (b) { b.classList.remove("payu-sf--selected"); }); btn.classList.add("payu-sf--selected"); state.installment = (n === 1) ? null : { provider: data.provider, number: n }; setStatus(""); }); el.instGrid.appendChild(btn); }); el.installPanel.hidden = false; } /* ============================================================ RETRIEVE CARD INSTALLMENTS (saved card flow) Called whenever a saved card is selected. Fill in the implementation below — on success call renderInstallments(data) with the API response payload. ============================================================ */ function retrieveCardInstallments(cardBin) { var additionalData = [ { key: "cardBin", value: cardBin }, {key: "requestType", value: "INSTALLMENTS"}, ]; window.Opf.payments.checkout.submit({ additionalData: additionalData, submitSuccess: function (response) { console.log("retrieveCardInstallments success", response); }, submitPending: function (response) { if (response && response.customFields && response.customFields.length > 0) { var map = new Map(response.customFields.map(function (obj) { return [obj.key, obj.value]; })); var provider = map.get("cardInstallmentsProvider"); var numbers = JSON.parse(map.get("cardInstallmentsNumber") || "[]"); if (provider && numbers.length) { renderInstallments({ provider: provider, numbers: numbers }); } } }, submitFailure: function (response) { console.error("retrieveCardInstallments failure", response); }, submitCancel: function () { window.location.href = "/checkout/opf-payment-and-review"; }, }); } /* ============================================================ SAVED CARDS UI ============================================================ */ function brandLabel(brand) { var labels = { visa: "VISA", mastercard: "MC", card: "CARD" }; return labels[brand] || brand.toUpperCase(); } function formatCardDigits(last4) { return last4 ? "•••• •••• •••• " + last4 : "•••• •••• •••• ••••"; } function renderSavedCards() { el.savedList.innerHTML = ""; SAVED_CARDS.forEach(function (card) { var btn = document.createElement("button"); btn.type = "button"; btn.className = "payu-sf-saved-card-btn"; btn.dataset.cardId = card.id; btn.innerHTML = '' + brandLabel(card.brand) + '' + '' + '' + formatCardDigits(card.last4) + '' + 'Expires ' + card.expiry + '' + '' + '' + '' + ''; btn.addEventListener("click", function () { pickSavedCard(card); }); el.savedList.appendChild(btn); }); var newBtn = document.createElement("button"); newBtn.type = "button"; newBtn.id = "payu-sf-new-card-btn"; newBtn.className = "payu-sf-new-card-btn"; newBtn.innerHTML = '' + 'New card'; newBtn.addEventListener("click", pickNewCard); el.savedList.appendChild(newBtn); } function setSavedListHighlight(cardId) { el.savedList.querySelectorAll(".payu-sf-saved-card-btn").forEach(function (btn) { btn.classList.toggle("payu-sf--selected", btn.dataset.cardId === cardId); }); var newBtn = document.getElementById("payu-sf-new-card-btn"); if (newBtn) newBtn.classList.toggle("payu-sf--selected", cardId === "__new__"); } function pickSavedCard(card) { state.mode = "saved"; state.selectedCard = card; setSavedListHighlight(card.id); el.newCardFields.hidden = true; el.installPanel.hidden = true; state.installment = null; setStatus(""); updateSubmitState(); //retrieveCardInstallments(card); // ← triggers the API call } function pickNewCard() { state.mode = "new"; state.selectedCard = null; setSavedListHighlight("__new__"); el.newCardFields.hidden = false; state.valid = { number: false, date: false, cvv: false }; state.touched = { number: false, date: false, cvv: false }; ["number", "date", "cvv"].forEach(function (f) { document.getElementById("payu-sf-" + f + "-host").classList.remove("payu-sf--invalid", "payu-sf--focus"); document.getElementById("payu-sf-" + f + "-error").textContent = ""; }); setStatus(""); updateSubmitState(); } /* ============================================================ PAYU FIELD WIRING ============================================================ */ function wireField(name, sdkField) { var hostId = "payu-sf-" + name + "-host"; var errorId = "payu-sf-" + name + "-error"; sdkField.on("ready", function () { state.ready[name] = true; updateSubmitState(); }); sdkField.on("focus", function () { document.getElementById(hostId).classList.add("payu-sf--focus"); }); sdkField.on("blur", function () { document.getElementById(hostId).classList.remove("payu-sf--focus"); state.touched[name] = true; if (!state.valid[name]) document.getElementById(hostId).classList.add("payu-sf--invalid"); }); sdkField.on("change", function (e) { var valid = e && e.error === false; state.valid[name] = valid; if (state.touched[name]) { document.getElementById(hostId).classList.toggle("payu-sf--invalid", !valid); document.getElementById(errorId).textContent = valid ? /* ── Reset ── */ .payu-sf-wrapper *, .payu-sf-wrapper *::before, .payu-sf-wrapper *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } body { margin: 0; padding: 0; } /* ── Container ── */ .payu-sf-wrapper { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1a1a2e; } .payu-sf-card { padding: 32px 28px; width: 100%; } /* ── Header ── */ .payu-sf-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 24px; } .payu-sf-logo { width: 36px; height: 36px; background: #6c47ff; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .payu-sf-logo svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; fill: #fff; } .payu-sf-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a2e; } .payu-sf-subtitle { font-size: 12px; color: #8892a4; margin-top: 1px; } /* ── Shared label style ── */ .payu-sf-label { display: block; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #5a5f7a; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-bottom: 6px; } /* ── Saved Cards ── */ .payu-sf-saved-section { margin-bottom: 20px; } .payu-sf-saved-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } /* Shared selected/hover ring — used by both saved-card and new-card buttons */ .payu-sf-saved-card-btn, .payu-sf-new-card-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; background: #fff; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .payu-sf-saved-card-btn:hover, .payu-sf-new-card-btn:hover { border-color: #6c47ff; background: #f8f6ff; } .payu-sf-saved-card-btn.payu-sf--selected, .payu-sf-new-card-btn.payu-sf--selected { border-color: #6c47ff; background: #f3f0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(108, 71, 255, 0.12); } /* Saved card specific */ .payu-sf-saved-card-btn { gap: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1.5px solid #dde2f0; text-align: left; } .payu-sf-brand-badge { flex-shrink: 0; width: 34px; height: 22px; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.03em; color: #fff; } .payu-sf-brand-badge.visa { background: #1a1f71; } .payu-sf-brand-badge.card { background: #8892a4; } .payu-sf-brand-badge.mastercard { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eb001b 0%, #f79e1b 100%); } .payu-sf-card-meta { flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; justify-content: space-between; } .payu-sf-card-digits { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a2e; letter-spacing: 0.06em; } .payu-sf-card-exp { font-size: 11px; color: #8892a4; } .payu-sf-card-tick { flex-shrink: 0; width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: #6c47ff; display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .payu-sf-saved-card-btn.payu-sf--selected .payu-sf-card-tick { display: flex; } .payu-sf-card-tick svg { width: 10px; height: 10px; } /* New card button specific */ .payu-sf-new-card-btn { gap: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1.5px dashed #c4b0ff; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #6c47ff; } /* ── New-card fields ── */ .payu-sf-new-card-fields[hidden] { display: none; } .payu-sf-divider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid #eef0f8; margin: 16px 0 20px; } .payu-sf-field-group { margin-bottom: 16px; } .payu-sf-input-host { height: 48px; border: 1.5px solid #dde2f0; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .payu-sf-input-host.payu-sf--focus { border-color: #6c47ff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(108, 71, 255, 0.12); } .payu-sf-input-host.payu-sf--invalid { border-color: #e53e3e; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(229, 62, 62, 0.10); } .payu-sf-row-half { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; } .payu-sf-error-msg { font-size: 11px; color: #e53e3e; margin-top: 4px; min-height: 14px; } /* ── Installments ── */ .payu-sf-installments { background: #f8f6ff; border: 1.5px solid #d4c5ff; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; animation: payu-sf-fadein 0.3s ease; } .payu-sf-installments[hidden] { display: none; } .payu-sf-installments-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #4a2cad; margin-bottom: 4px; } .payu-sf-installments-provider { font-size: 11px; color: #7b5ea7; margin-bottom: 12px; } .payu-sf-installments-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; } .payu-sf-inst-btn { appearance: none; border: 1.5px solid #c4b0ff; background: #fff; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #4a2cad; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s; line-height: 1.4; } .payu-sf-inst-btn:hover { background: #ede8ff; border-color: #6c47ff; } .payu-sf-inst-btn.payu-sf--selected { background: #6c47ff; border-color: #6c47ff; color: #fff; } .payu-sf-inst-min-note { font-size: 11px; color: #9a8abf; margin-top: 8px; } /* ── Submit button ── */ .payu-sf-submit-btn { width: 100%; padding: 14px; background: #6c47ff; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .payu-sf-submit-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #5433d6; } .payu-sf-submit-btn:active:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(0.99); } .payu-sf-submit-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; } /* ── Spinner ── */ .payu-sf-spinner { width: 16px; height: 16px; border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); border-top-color: #fff; border-radius: 50%; animation: payu-sf-spin 0.7s linear infinite; display: none; } .payu-sf-submit-btn.payu-sf--loading .payu-sf-spinner { display: block; } .payu-sf-submit-btn.payu-sf--loading .payu-sf-btn-text { opacity: 0.7; } /* ── Status message ── */ .payu-sf-status { margin-top: 12px; font-size: 13px; text-align: center; min-height: 18px; color: #5a5f7a; } .payu-sf-status.payu-sf--error { color: #e53e3e; } .payu-sf-status.payu-sf--success { color: #16a34a; font-weight: 500; } /* ── Animations ── */ @keyframes payu-sf-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes payu-sf-fadein { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-4px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
